name: sdk
context: Client SDK libraries for querying, learning from, and executing Dojo nodes programmatically
info: The Dojo SDK provides typed client libraries for integrating with the Dojo registry from application code. The primary SDK is @dojo/sdk for JavaScript/TypeScript, with community SDKs for Python (dojo-sdk) and Go (dojo-go). SDKs wrap the REST API with typed methods for search, inspect, learn, graph traversal, and bundle download. They handle pagination, error formatting, and response typing automatically. The SDK is how agent frameworks integrate with Dojo — instead of raw HTTP calls, they use `dojo.search()`, `dojo.learn()`, and `dojo.execute()`. See [[dojo/api]] for the underlying HTTP contract and [[dojo/cli]] for the terminal interface.

sections.title: JavaScript / TypeScript SDK
sections.body: Install with `npm install @dojo/sdk`. Import `DojoClient` and create an instance with the registry URL. All methods return typed promises. The SDK handles pagination automatically for search results. Error responses throw `DojoError` with status code, message, and the original response. TypeScript types are bundled — no `@types/` package needed.

sections.title: Python SDK
sections.body: Install with `pip install dojo-sdk`. Import `DojoClient` and create an instance with the registry URL. Methods return typed dataclasses. The SDK uses `httpx` for async support. Pagination is handled automatically. Requires Python >= 3.10.

sections.title: SDK methods
sections.body: Core methods: `search()` finds nodes by text/tag/type, `inspect()` gets the full manifest, `learn()` gets knowledge content, `graph().neighbors()` gets connected nodes, `graph().backlinks()` gets reverse links, `bundle()` downloads the skill package, `alias()` resolves names to URIs, `tree()` gets subtree structure. Each method maps directly to a [[dojo/api]] endpoint.

sections.title: Agent framework integration
sections.body: Agent frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGPT, Claude Agent SDK) use the SDK to give agents Dojo access. Create a tool that wraps `dojo.search()` for discovery and `dojo.learn()` for knowledge retrieval. The agent can then find and learn from Dojo nodes as part of its reasoning loop. See [[dojo/skill#bundle-workflow]] for how to package skills for agent consumption.

related.note: SDK wraps the API into typed client methods
CLI is for terminal use; SDK is for programmatic use
SDK connects to a running Dojo server

author: dojo-community
